title: LLM Validator Plugin Configuration
description: Configuration for LLM validation rules and policies

require_https.title: Require HTTPS
require_https.description: Enforce that all LLM API endpoints use HTTPS

blocked_vendors.title: Blocked Vendors
blocked_vendors.description: List of LLM vendors that are blocked by policy

min_privacy_score.title: Minimum Privacy Score
min_privacy_score.description: Minimum required privacy score for LLMs (0-100)

require_description.title: Require Description
require_description.description: Require that all LLMs have a description
